context: Tests whether the agent creates a complete use case specification for UC-001 Place Order following the prescribed template structure, including correct file naming, all required sections, properly numbered steps, referenced alternative flows, paired postconditions, business rules with BR-XXX IDs, and business-level step language.

checklist.name: File location & name
checklist.description: Spec file is created at docs/use_cases/ and the filename starts with UC-001 in kebab-case (e.g. UC-001-place-order.md)

checklist.name: Overview: UC-XXX ID
checklist.description: Overview section includes a Use Case ID field set to UC-001

checklist.name: Overview: primary actor
checklist.description: Overview section includes a Primary Actor field (e.g. Customer)

checklist.name: Overview: goal stated
checklist.description: Overview section includes a Goal field with a non-empty description of the actor's goal

checklist.name: Overview: valid Status
checklist.description: Overview section includes a Status field set to one of the allowed values (Draft, Reviewed, Approved, Implemented, Tested, Done, Obsolete)

checklist.name: Numbered steps, no gaps
checklist.description: Main Success Scenario contains consecutively numbered steps starting at 1 with no gaps

checklist.name: Main scenario ends with goal
checklist.description: The final step of the Main Success Scenario describes the goal being achieved (e.g. order confirmed, confirmation displayed)

checklist.name: At least two alternative flows
checklist.description: The Alternative Flows section contains at least two distinct alternative flows (e.g. payment declined, out-of-stock item)

checklist.name: Trigger references a step number
checklist.description: Every alternative flow's Trigger statement references a specific main scenario step number (e.g. 'step 5' or '(step 6)')

checklist.name: Alternative flow endings
checklist.description: Every alternative flow ends with either 'Use case continues at step N' or a statement that the use case ends — not an open-ended continuation

checklist.name: Success postcondition
checklist.description: Postconditions section includes a non-empty Success Postconditions subsection

checklist.name: Failure postcondition
checklist.description: Postconditions section includes a non-empty Failure Postconditions subsection

checklist.name: Business rules with BR-XXX IDs
checklist.description: Business Rules section contains at least one rule with a BR-XXX identifier (e.g. BR-001)

checklist.name: Business-level step language
checklist.description: No step in the Main Success Scenario or any alternative flow contains technical implementation language such as SQL statements, HTTP method names (POST, GET), class names, regex patterns, or exception names
